microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end deployment** of Azure's resilience validation program, scaling from a 2-person operation to a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned drill execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Built and deployed an **internal AI agent** for drill planning, restructuring workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21% — directly expanding the team's ability to serve more enterprise accounts.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, managing compliance risk and multi-stakeholder alignment.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability, delivering a production program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects before they impacted borrower-facing or enterprise operations.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI agent adoption** across 14 Azure service teams through hands-on demos and training, translating complex agentic workflows into actionable playbooks that saved **37 engineering hours monthly** and accelerated production deployment.

Shaped the product roadmap by conducting **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the inclusion of intent-based YAML generation as a prioritized roadmap item.

Improved agent performance and data retrieval by enforcing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** system, reducing lookup time by 83% and increasing reliability of LLM-powered tooling.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across **140+ teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, accelerating region launches by 28% and generating **$3M in accelerated revenue** through faster time-to-production.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify 81 hours of manual toil per region launch, then built a **product roadmap** to automate critical paths — directly reducing operational friction at enterprise deployment scale.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments with data-backed confidence.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **end-to-end migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit OS transition, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime — demonstrating the deployment discipline required for production-grade AI systems at scale.

Partnered with IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable integration model across a complex multi-stakeholder environment.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and backlog prioritization to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and unblocking cross-functional teams from hitting deployment milestones on schedule.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a new CRM process that improved account health visibility and reduced execution friction.

Cut Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversion by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing web presence and search visibility to drive measurable top-of-funnel growth.

Conducted profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering data-backed pricing recommendations that improved unit economics and gave leadership clearer inputs for strategic decisions.
